item.title: Publications
item.description: English Articles Knorre, A. (2020). Do Russian Police Fabricate Drug Offenses? Evidence From Seized Heroin’s Weight Distribution. Journal of Drug Issues. https://doi.org/10.1177/0022042620918951 Russian Articles Verkeev A. M., Volkov V. V., Dzmitryieva A. V., Knorre A. V., Kudryavtsev V. E., Kuznetsova D. A., Kuchakov R. K., Titaev K. D., Khodzhaeva E. A. (2019). How to study victims of crime? [Как изучать жертв преступлений?] Monitoring of Public Opinion: Economic and Social Changes. PDF

item.title: Data
item.description: I prepared and maintain following datasets: Russian Crime Victimization Survey, 2018. [Dataverse] Homicide rates in Russian cities, 2020. [Data and guide in Russian on Github]

item.title: So I am a blogger
item.description: This is a test of a blog.
